item.title: Transformer (big) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.213B License: open Type: model "Transformer Big — 32 768 tokens per step × 300 000 steps → 9.83 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."

item.title: Transformer (base) (Google)
item.description: Parameters: 0.065B License: open Type: model "Transformer Base — 32 768 tokens per step × 100 000 steps → 3.28 B tokens processed" "We trained on the standard WMT 2014 English-German dataset consisting of about 4.5 million sentence pairs... For English-French, we used the significantly larger WMT 2014 English-French dataset consisting of 36M sentences and split tokens into a 32000 word-piece vocabulary. Sentence pairs were batched together by approximate sequence length. Each training batch contained a set of sentence pairs containing approximately 25000 source tokens and 25000 target tokens."
